case_title: EDWARD G CORVI VS. ALLYSON ALEKSEY ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-24-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-24-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF EDWARD G CORVI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS ALLYSON ALEKSEY AND JAY DAVID RUSSELL ARE BOTH PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF/DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-24-2025 - JUDGMENT.
